name: coShutDown
title: coShutDown
description: 0 - object dictionary is not deleted (can also be used again after renewed coStartUp)1 - object dictionary is deleted (must be generated again)
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coShutDown( dword deleteOD, dword errCode[] );
Stops the CANopen® communication of the node.

deleteOD Specifies whether the object dictionary should be deleted 0 - object dictionary is not deleted (can also be used again after renewed coStartUp)1 - object dictionary is deleted (must be generated again)
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
Example dword errCode[1];coShutDown( 1, errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "Shut down node with clearing object dictionary successfully" );}
